creator: dave@jetcafe.org
text:
I just tried to build this as committed (but cherry picked into Q4 which is libressl 3.7.3) and it is not working:

[00:00:05] SSLeay.c:4505:9: error: incompatible integer to pointer conversion assigning to 'SSL_SESSION *' (aka 'struct ssl_session_st *') from 'int' [-Wint-conversion]
[00:00:05]         RETVAL = SSL_SESSION_dup(sess);

There's a lot of other warnings too.
